analysis.object: T574: Sandcastle Structural Failure Depth depth analysis

dry_sand.description: Dry sand: EML-0 discrete grains; no cohesion
dry_sand.reason: Dry sand is EML-0: independent particles with no cooperative structure

water_cohesion.description: Water bridges between grains: exponential cohesion increase with moisture
water_cohesion.reason: Capillary cohesion is EML-1: exponential increase with water film thickness

optimal_measurement.description: Optimal water content is EML-2 measurement problem: Laplace pressure balance
optimal_measurement.reason: Optimal sand is EML-2: measurement of capillary vs gravitational force

wave_failure.description: Wave impact: EML-3 oscillatory stress -> catastrophic EML-inf structural failure
wave_failure.reason: Sandcastle failure under waves is EML-inf: oscillatory stress exceeds cohesion threshold
